packageRules.description: Pin actions/checkout to v5 until container actions support v6 credential storage
Supply-chain quarantine — digest, pin, pinDigest, and lockFileMaintenance updates are hash-based or lock-file-only changes that carry minimal supply-chain risk, so no minimum age is required.

Supply-chain quarantine — patch updates: 3-day hold allows the ecosystem (npm security team, Socket, Snyk, etc.) to detect and pull malicious releases, which are typically caught within 24–72 hours. Vulnerability-driven updates (osvVulnerabilityAlerts) bypass this age gate automatically.
Supply-chain quarantine — minor updates: 5-day hold for new features; wider API surface warrants slightly more bake time. Vulnerability-driven updates bypass this age gate automatically.

Supply-chain quarantine — major updates: 7-day hold for breaking-change releases; higher surface area and migration effort justify the longest quarantine. Vulnerability-driven updates bypass this age gate automatically.

Supply-chain quarantine — catch-all for bump, rollback, and replacement update types not covered by the patch/minor/major rules above. A 5-day hold is applied as a conservative default. Vulnerability-driven updates bypass this age gate automatically.
